raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying multiple issues with unsupported claims and internal contradictions.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps the work against several prior works (Smith et al., Liu et al.) and clearly articulates the differences and contributions of SentiBridge.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing or incorrect citations, such as the contradiction with Liu et al. (2019) and the vague data provenance for Mandarin and Arabic corpora.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty in several claims, particularly regarding the novelty of the training procedure and the evaluation on low-resource languages.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within the scope of the requested dimensions and does not drift into unrelated areas.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies issues that could lead to misinterpretation, such as the vague data provenance and undefined 'translation drift.'",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed annotations for major changes and logical points, though minor edits are not traced with the same level of detail."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying multiple issues with unsupported claims and internal contradictions.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps the work against several prior works (Smith et al., Liu et al.) and clearly articulates the differences and contributions of SentiBridge.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing or incorrect citations, such as the contradiction with Liu et al. (2019) and the vague data provenance for Mandarin and Arabic corpora.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty in several claims, particularly regarding the novelty of the training procedure and the evaluation on low-resource languages.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within the scope of the requested dimensions and does not drift into unrelated areas.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies issues that could lead to misinterpretation, such as the vague data provenance and undefined 'translation drift.'
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed annotations for major changes and logical points, though minor edits are not traced with the same level of detail.
